Source: Vertex AI API Reference
URL: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/reference
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Vertex AI API Usage Overview - Content Extraction

## Page Structure
This is a Google Cloud documentation page for Vertex AI's API reference, serving as a comprehensive navigation hub for developers.

## SDK & Client Library References

- Python SDK for Vertex AI (with language model specific references)
- gcloud CLI reference tools (standard and beta versions)
- Client libraries for multiple languages: C#, Go, Java, Node.js
- REST API reference (v1 and v1beta1 versions)

## Major API Resource Categories

The page catalogs extensive REST endpoints across v1 and v1beta1 APIs, including:
- Batch prediction and custom jobs
- Dataset management and annotations
- Endpoint deployment and model prediction
- Feature stores and online feature serving
- Model training and evaluation
- Pipeline orchestration
- Hyperparameter tuning
- Indexes and vector search
- Metadata management
- Monitoring and anomaly detection
- Notebook execution environments
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) operations
- Reasoning engines

## Notable Features

Cached content management, long-running operations, IAM policy controls, and streaming prediction capabilities are documented across the reference materials.

## Cross-Product Navigation

Technology areas including AI/ML, application development, compute, data analytics, databases, networking, and security. Cross-product tools for access management, costs/usage management, and infrastructure as code.
